title: AgePrediction
description: Age prediction result returned by the Agify API for a single name lookup.

name.description: The name as processed by the API. May differ from the input if diacritics were stripped or if first/last name parsing occurred.

age.description: Predicted age in years based on statistical analysis of name distributions. Null when the name is absent from the dataset.

count.description: Number of data records supporting the age prediction. Higher values indicate greater statistical confidence.

country_id.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to scope the prediction, echoed from the request when provided.
